ReplayFile.description: Replay file name, must be placed in AssettoServer folder

StartFrame.description: Start frame of the replay, to skip a part

LoopLap.description: Looping lap number, negative numbers are counted from the end

LoopStart.description: Start frame number for the looping part if greater than 0, will override the lap setting

LoopEnd.description: End frame number for the looping part

AutoStart.description: Number of cars that will auto start and keep looping when the server is launched

AutoStartOffset.description: If greater than 0 cars will be this frames one from the other instead of evenly ditributed

RaceCars.description: Number of cars that will start in a race session, the replay file must contains at least those

RecalcVelocities.description: Enable if using an online recorded replay and cars are stuttering/shaking
